Fleet Portal

Drivers, dispatch, trucks, documents, maintenance and safety.

ACCOUNT TYPEBusinessRole-based access planned

Driver Passport status, HOS, assignments and messages.

🚚 Equipment

Truck and trailer inspection and maintenance status.

📡 Dispatch

Trips, ETA, paperwork, invoicing and customer messages.
